base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of world_8_3_layout — a tile (level_layout) from 1985 super mario bros. Overworld castle-approach — Hammer-Bros convention. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Overworld castle-approach — Hammer-Bros convention; many hammer-brothers back-to-back before final castle.
